---
sidebar: false
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
  fields: ["image", "title", "description", "date", "categories"]
about:
  id: about-me
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 10em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/timkoval/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/timkoval
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/timk0val
    - icon: emoji-smile
      text: Hugging Face
      href: https://huggingface.co/timkoval
    - icon: cup-straw
      text: Buy Me a Coffee
      href: https://www.buymeacoffee.com/timkoval
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:aayushmnit@gmail.com
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

:::{#about-me}
\
Hello, I'm Tim Koval.\
I'm a Research and Development Engineer who loves to discover effective ways of building complex things. Mostly into Machine Learning, Robotics and all sorts of exciting R&D tasks with scientific outcomes being estimated.\
[Email me](mailto:timkoval00@gmail.com) if you have anything to discuss and read more from the posts listed below.
:::

---
